root.sql:
select tab_level.item_desc , tab_level.level_min , tab_level.level_max ,( select count( 1 ) from sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_share_mem where sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no in ( select membership_no from sc_lon_m_loan_card where principal_balance > 0 ) and extract(year from current_date)::int - extract(year from sc_mem_m_membership_registered.date_of_birth)::int between tab_level.level_min and tab_level.level_max ) as c_count
,( select sum( principal_balance ) from sc_lon_m_loan_card , sc_mem_m_share_mem where sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no and sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no in ( select membership_no from sc_mem_m_membership_registered where extract(year from current_date)::int - extract(year from sc_mem_m_membership_registered.date_of_birth)::int between tab_level.level_min and tab_level.level_max ) ) as c_amt
,( select count( 1 ) from sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_share_mem where sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no and sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock = 0 and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no in ( select membership_no from sc_lon_m_loan_card where principal_balance > 0 ) and extract(year from current_date)::int - extract(year from sc_mem_m_membership_registered.date_of_birth)::int between tab_level.level_min and tab_level.level_max ) as c_count_npl
,( select sum( principal_balance ) from sc_lon_m_loan_card , sc_mem_m_share_mem where sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no and sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock = 0 and sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no in ( select membership_no from sc_mem_m_membership_registered where extract(year from current_date)::int - extract(year from sc_mem_m_membership_registered.date_of_birth)::int between tab_level.level_min and tab_level.level_max ) ) as c_amt_npl
from ( select (case level when 1 then 0 when 2 then 50 when 3 then 56 when 4 then 61 end) as level_min , (case level when 1 then 49 when 2 then 55 when 3 then 60 when 4 then 9999 end) as level_max , (case level when 1 then 'ต่ำกว่า 50 ' when 2 then 'อายุ 50-55 ปี' when 3 then 'อายุ 56-60 ปี' when 4 then 'อายุ 60 ปี' end) as item_desc from generate_series(1,4) as level ) tab_level /*WHERE*/
